title: Great Lazy Brazilian Tofu Skillet
description: A mustardy and shattering lazy Sunday Brazilian dish featuring hoisin sauce, this plant-based friendly recipe is perfect for a relaxing day at home. It combines the flavors of Brazil with the ease of a one-pan skillet meal.

ingredients.name: firm tofu
ingredients.notes: drained and cut into small cubes

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it starts to brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped bell pepper and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the cubed tofu and cook until it is golden brown on all sides, about 5 minutes.
In a small bowl, whisk together the hoisin sauce and brown mustard.
Pour the sauce into the skillet and stir to combine.
Scrape the bottom of the skillet to deglaze, releasing all the browned bits.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
